case_title: DEBRA HELEM VS. SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY HELEM, DEBRA AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-14-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HELEM, DEBRA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) ZACHARY KEENAN, LEGAL CLERK FILED BY DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF -DECLARATION OF DILIGENCE ATTACHED (WAIVER) SERVED APR-20-2021, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-14-2021 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF DEBRA HELEM IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUHTORITY REPRESETNED BY ZACHARY KEENAN, LEGAL CLERK IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. COURT DERTERMINES THAT PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM WAS FILED UNTIMLY AGAINST DEFENDANT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HELEM, DEBRA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. COMPLAINT AGAINST DEFENDANT IS UNTIMELY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
